sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87961" key="proma/lagges" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμάλαγγες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, Cyprian name for <sense id="n87961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flatterers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
